name: Beer Batter Fried Veggies
recipeInstructions:
Suggested Veggies 'n' Things:
Use the following vegetables to equal 4 to 5 cups: broccoli florets, cauliflower heads, sliced mushrooms, sliced zucchini, or chilled spears of mozzarella cheese.
In a deep fryer, heat oil to 375 degrees F. Meanwhile, in a large bowl, beat together the golden onion soup mix, flour, baking powder, eggs, mustard, and beer until smooth and well combined. Let batter stand for 10 minutes. Dip the suggested vegetables into the batter, then carefully drop them into the hot oil. Fry, turning once, until golden brown; drain on paper towels. Serve warm. Makes about 4 cups vegies 'n' things.
